items.summary: Add the Gmail address khushpal1011@gmail.com to the Contact section's contact information area. Display it as a clickable mailto: link alongside the existing phone number (+91 8527230903). Also ensure the mobile number +91 8527230903 is prominently displayed as a clickable tel: link in the contact info area (if not already present). Both pieces of contact info should be visible in the Contact section and in the Footer.
